title.zh-TW: AI 代理工作流程：搜尋現有節點
title.en: AI Agent Workflow: Search Existing Nodes

body.zh-TW: AI 代理在建立新節點前，應先呼叫 `search_nodes("認證機制")` 等功能，確認知識庫中是否已存在相關節點，避免重複。
body.en: Before creating a new node, an AI agent should first call `search_nodes("authentication mechanism")` or similar functions to check if related nodes already exist in the knowledge base, preventing duplication.
